creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
- Supersedes earlier mail/fetchmail update to 6.3.9
  (patch-fetchlimit-exitstatus was forgotten, sorry for that)

- Update to 6.3.9, fixing some critical and security bugs
- Adds some translations to pkg-plist

- does not yet fix portlint complaint about late USE_PYTHON

Added file(s):
- files/patch-fetchlimit-exitstatus

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-CVE-2007-4565
- files/patch-CVE-2008-2711

Port maintainer (barner@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
